title: Turkish police storm main opposition CHP’s party headquarters
full_text:
Turkish police storm main opposition CHP’s party headquarters
Turkish police storm main opposition CHP’s party headquarters
Violence erupted after Turkish police stormed the headquarters of the main opposition CHP party in Ankara following a court ruling that removed leader Ozgur Ozel and reinstated former chairman Kemal Kilicdaroglu. Officers fired tear gas and smashed through barricades, removing Ozel from the building.
Published On 24 May 2026
